Back to top
View this page

iwfm¶

Modules

Unbuffered(stream)

Unbuffered() - Write unbuffered output to console, for example

bnds2mask(bnds_d, coords)

bnds2mask() - Bounding polygon for IWFM mmodel

bud2csv(f, loc_names, column_headers, ...[, ...])

budget2csv() - open an IWFM Budget HDF file and retreive all of the data

budget_info(budget_lines)

budget_info() - Get the Budget file header and footer length and number of tables

calib

cdec2monthly(input_file, output_file[, verbose])

cdec2monthly() - Read a CDEC observations file, converts sub-monthly

cfs2afd(cfs)

cfs2afd() - Convert flow in CFS to daily volume in Acre-Feet

closest_list

date_index(inval, start_date)

date_index() - Calculate a date inval months from start_date

date_util

dbf_open() - Open a DBF file (read with PyShp)

dbf_print_record(db, rec)

dbf_print_record() - Print a DBF record to command line

debug

detaw_2_table(dir_name, outfile_name[, verbose])
